ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program or major */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "tuition_fee" TEXT /* Tuition fee for the program */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Application deadline for the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the requirement belongs to */,
  "requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of requirement (e.g., High school transcript) */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Whether the requirement is required */,
  "recommended" INTEGER /* Whether the requirement is recommended */,
  "minimum_score" REAL /* Minimum score required for the requirement */,
  "maximum_score" REAL /* Maximum score for the requirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requirements_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the applicant is applying to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the applicant */,
  "citizenship" TEXT /* Citizenship of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applicants_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant who uploaded the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., High school transcript) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviews" (
  "interview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interview */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant who was interviewed */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the interview */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the applicant */,
  "interviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interviewer */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the interviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_interviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("interviewer_id") REFERENCES interviewers ("interviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_scores" (
  "test_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test score */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant who took the test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., SAT, ACT) */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the applicant */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scores_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant whose status is being updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., In Review, Accepted) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the status was last updated */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the decision was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_status_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., applicant, admissions staff, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviewers" (
  "interviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interviewer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the interviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the interviewer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the interviewer (e.g., admissions staff, faculty member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant the tag is assigned to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., 'priority', 'international') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant the comment is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
